# programs.macchina

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.macchina`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.macchina.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable macchina system information fetcher. |
| `programs.macchina.package` | `null or package` | The macchina package to use. |
| `programs.macchina.settings.current_shell` | `null or boolean` | Show the current shell rather than the user's default shell. |
| `programs.macchina.settings.disk_space_percentage` | `null or boolean` | Show percentage next to disk space information. |
| `programs.macchina.settings.disks` | `null or (list of string)` | Disks to show disk usage for. |
| `programs.macchina.settings.interface` | `null or string` | Network interface to use for the LocalIP readout. Omitted when null. |
| `programs.macchina.settings.long_kernel` | `null or boolean` | Show lengthened kernel output. |
| `programs.macchina.settings.long_shell` | `null or boolean` | Show lengthened shell output. |
| `programs.macchina.settings.long_uptime` | `null or boolean` | Show lengthened uptime output. |
| `programs.macchina.settings.memory_percentage` | `null or boolean` | Show percentage next to memory information. |
| `programs.macchina.settings.physical_cores` | `null or boolean` | Show physical CPU core count rather than logical core count. |
| `programs.macchina.settings.show` | `null or (list of (one of "Host", "Machine", "Kernel", "Distribution", "OperatingSystem", "DesktopEnvironment", "WindowManager", "Resolution", "Backlight", "Packages", "LocalIP", "Terminal", "Shell", "Uptime", "Processor", "ProcessorLoad", "Memory", "Battery", "GPU", "DiskSpace"))` | Display only the specified readouts. When null, all readouts are shown. Values are case-sensitive. |
| `programs.macchina.settings.theme` | `null or string` | Name of the theme to use, without the .toml extension. Case-sensitive. Must correspond to a file in the macchina themes directory, or be defined in {option}`programs.macchina.themes`. Omitted when null. |
| `programs.macchina.themes` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Attribute set of macchina themes. Each entry is written to {file}`$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/macchina/themes/<name>.toml`. Theme names are case-sensitive. A theme defined here can be activated by setting {option}`programs.macchina.settings.theme` to its name. See <https://github.com/Macchina-CLI/macchina/wiki/Customization> for details. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.bar` | `null or (submodule)` | Bar section. Replaces data ranging from 0–100% with visual bars. Omit to exclude the [bar] section entirely. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.bar.glyph` | `null or string` | Glyph to use for all bars. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.bar.hide_delimiters` | `null or boolean` | Whether to hide bar delimiters. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.bar.symbol_close` | `null or string` | Closing delimiter character. Must be a single character. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.bar.symbol_open` | `null or string` | Opening delimiter character. Must be a single character. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.bar.visible` | `null or boolean` | Whether to show bars. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.box` | `null or (submodule)` | Box section. Renders a box around system information. Omit to exclude the [box] section entirely. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.box.border` | `null or one of "plain", "thick", "rounded", "double"` | Border style for the box. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.box.inner_margin` | `null or (submodule)` | Inner margin between content and the box border. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.box.inner_margin.x` | `null or (unsigned integer, meaning >=0)` | Horizontal margin between content and the box border. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.box.inner_margin.y` | `null or (unsigned integer, meaning >=0)` | Vertical margin between content and the box border. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.box.title` | `null or string` | Title displayed on the box. Omitted from config when null. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.box.visible` | `null or boolean` | Whether to show the box. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.custom_ascii` | `null or (submodule)` | Custom ASCII section. Specify your own ASCII art file. Omit to exclude the [custom_ascii] section entirely. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.custom_ascii.color` | `null or string` | Color of the ASCII art. Omitted when null. Accepts hex ("#00FF00"), indexed ("046"), or named colors (e.g. "Green"). |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.custom_ascii.path` | `null or string or absolute path` | Path to a file containing ASCII art. ANSI escape sequences are supported. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.hide_ascii` | `null or boolean` | Whether to disable ASCII rendering entirely. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.key_color` | `null or string` | Color of the keys. Omitted when null. Accepts hex ("#00FF00"), indexed ("046"), or named colors (e.g. "Cyan"). |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.keys` | `null or (submodule)` | Keys section. Overrides the display label for each readout. Omit to exclude the [keys] section entirely. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.keys.backlight` | `null or string` | Label for the Backlight readout. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.keys.battery` | `null or string` | Label for the Battery readout. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.keys.cpu` | `null or string` | Label for the Processor readout. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.keys.cpu_load` | `null or string` | Label for the ProcessorLoad readout. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.keys.de` | `null or string` | Label for the DesktopEnvironment readout. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.keys.disk_space` | `null or string` | Label for the DiskSpace readout. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.keys.distro` | `null or string` | Label for the Distribution readout. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.keys.gpu` | `null or string` | Label for the GPU readout. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.keys.host` | `null or string` | Label for the Host readout. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.keys.kernel` | `null or string` | Label for the Kernel readout. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.keys.local_ip` | `null or string` | Label for the LocalIP readout. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.keys.machine` | `null or string` | Label for the Machine readout. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.keys.memory` | `null or string` | Label for the Memory readout. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.keys.os` | `null or string` | Label for the OperatingSystem readout. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.keys.packages` | `null or string` | Label for the Packages readout. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.keys.resolution` | `null or string` | Label for the Resolution readout. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.keys.shell` | `null or string` | Label for the Shell readout. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.keys.terminal` | `null or string` | Label for the Terminal readout. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.keys.uptime` | `null or string` | Label for the Uptime readout. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.keys.wm` | `null or string` | Label for the WindowManager readout. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.padding` | `null or (unsigned integer, meaning >=0)` | Padding between content and its surroundings. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.palette` | `null or (submodule)` | Palette section. Displays the active colorscheme of your terminal emulator. Omit to exclude the [palette] section entirely. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.palette.glyph` | `null or string` | Glyph for the palette. Append a trailing space to separate glyphs. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.palette.spacing` | `null or signed integer` | The amount of spacing to leave between each glyph. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.palette.type` | `null or one of "Dark", "Light", "Full"` | Color set to use for the palette. Case-sensitive. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.palette.visible` | `null or boolean` | Whether to show the palette. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.prefer_small_ascii` | `null or boolean` | Always use smaller variants of built-in ASCII art. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.randomize` | `null or (submodule)` | Randomize section. Controls random color selection for keys and separators. Omit to exclude the [randomize] section entirely. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.randomize.key_color` | `null or boolean` | Whether to randomize the key color. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.randomize.pool` | `null or one of "hexadecimal", "indexed", "base"` | Pool of colors to draw from when randomizing. Omitted when null. - "hexadecimal": random color #000000–#FFFFFF - "indexed": random color 0–255 - "base": random from black, white, red, green, blue, yellow, magenta, cyan |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.randomize.separator_color` | `null or boolean` | Whether to randomize the separator color. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.separator` | `null or string` | Glyph to use as the separator. |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.separator_color` | `null or string` | Color of the separator. Omitted when null. Accepts hex ("#00FF00"), indexed ("046"), or named colors (e.g. "White"). |
| `programs.macchina.themes.<name>.spacing` | `null or (unsigned integer, meaning >=0)` | Spacing between the separator and adjacent content. |
